## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Contract/API clarification

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `Unreleased`
- [ ] I did not include secrets or machine-specific data
- [ ] I kept the PR focused and reviewable
